## Test plan
- [ ] Ran `python app.py` locally and verified the affected pages
- [ ] Tested at least one ticker from each affected market
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -q` is green
- [ ] No new lint errors (`ruff check .`)

## Documentation (mandatory if shipping a release)
- [ ] **CHANGELOG.md** — entry for this version under `## [X.Y.Z]`
- [ ] **README.md** — "What's new in vX.Y.Z" + any updated tables (Pages,
      API, Tests, Scoring, Limitations)
- [ ] **SECURITY.md** — "Latest: **vX.Y.Z**" + new "Hardening applied in
      vX.Y.Z" if security work
- [ ] **CONTRIBUTING.md** — "Where to contribute" if module/package added
- [ ] **`pyproject.toml`** + **`app.py`** — version pins match
- [ ] `bash scripts/check_version_sync.sh` passes

See [RELEASING.md](../RELEASING.md) for the full release checklist.
